collection_policy.robots_observation: No User-agent or Disallow rule was present. The only line named the public sitemap.
collection_policy.copyright_policy: Do not reproduce article bodies. Keep only manually written standalone Q&A with the minimum source excerpt needed to verify each answer.
collection_policy.access_policy: Do not work around the site's demo notice, authentication, payment, or other access controls. A title or URL is not evidence for facts that may have appeared in the missing article body.

live_access.observation: The current host is a limited recovered-site demo, not a functioning copy of the original WordPress blog.
live_access.gate_evidence: The DEMO version only includes 4 pages

accessible_demo_pages.content_role: biographical page; no durable instructional fact admitted
links page; no educational content admitted
portfolio index used only to verify one article title

unavailable_public_endpoints.observation: The sitemap-listed portfolioCats URL is the current HTTP 200 resource; stripping that path suffix produces this HTTP 404 URL.

exclusions.reason: Each live URL returned the explicit demo notice instead of its article body. Titles and URLs were indexed, but no missing content was inferred or copied.
